reason: All steps executed successfully. Agent responded correctly to mathematical question with correct answer.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent dashboard with agent list in sidebar.
Found agent "QA-20260616-174353-9gxn" in sidebar — Agent was visible in the "Your Agents" list with "idle" status indicator.
Clicked on agent "QA-20260616-174353-9gxn" — Agent page loaded, displaying agent home with message input and status indicator showing "idle".
Verified agent status — Agent status confirmed as "idle" (satisfies requirement of "running" or "idle").
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input — Message successfully entered in textbox, send button became enabled.
Clicked send button to submit message — Message submitted successfully, agent transitioned to "working" status.
Waited for agent response — Activity indicator showed "Working..." with elapsed time, response completed in approximately 1 second (well within 3-minute limit).
Verified response mentions "4" — Agent response clearly displayed "4" as the answer, with additional metadata "Worked for 1s". Session was automatically named "QA Session: Basic Math Question".
Captured final screenshot — Screenshot taken showing complete chat with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4", with agent status returning to "idle" after completion.
